text.title: Stratified sampling recipe — worked example
text.summary: One end-to-end recipe for a 4-cohort × 3-tool × 2-intent agent on a 200-case/day budget.

section.title: Inputs
section.p: Eval manifest holds 1,800 cases. Production traffic distribution (last 30d) and the daily budget feed the recipe build.

list.item: Cap head at floor(200 * 0.4) = 80. Spillover 30 cases redistributed equally to tail strata: +10 to each.
Final: 80, 50, 40, 30. Sum = 200. All quotas ≥ tail_floor 5. Max share 40%.

section.title: Diff vs prior recipe (1.1.0)
section.p: Prior version had `trial` share 0.04 (now 0.10) — Δ = 0.06, below 0.10 threshold, BUT max_age was 32 days → forced refresh by age. parent_version pinned to 1.1.0.

section.title: Day-2 behaviour
section.p: Next morning, traffic shares move by 1–3% absolute. Recipe age 1 day. Carry-forward — same case ids, day-over-day deltas are diffable. Logged: `carry-forward parent=1.2.0 age=1d max_dshare=0.03`.
